notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 22 CVEs: CVE-2024-37356, CVE-2024-38558, CVE-2024-41076, CVE-2024-36979, CVE-2024-38555, and 17 more.
